data.keyword: how to clean a dishwasher filter

result.keyword: how to clean a dishwasher filter

items.markdown:
![Easy Ways to Clean a Dishwasher Filter: 8 Steps (with Pictures)](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/07210057-2120-0139-0000-f4d1148b6075:6)
To clean your dishwasher filter, `pull out the bottom rack, unlock and remove the filter assembly from the bottom of the tub, and rinse it under warm water. Soak stubborn grime or hard water buildup in hot, soapy water with a splash of white vinegar. Gently scrub with a soft brush, then reassemble`.[](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Qf8SHP701xM&t=13) [[1]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Qf8SHP701xM&t=13)[[2]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6NKUjmnRiSw&t=23)

For a deeper look at the process, here are step-by-step instructions:

1. Locate and Remove the Filter

- **Find it:** The filter is typically located at the very bottom of the dishwasher, often beneath the lower spray arm.
- **Unlock:** Twist the filter cylinder counterclockwise (usually a quarter or half turn) to unlock it.
- **Remove:** Gently lift it out. Many filter systems have two parts: a cylindrical inner filter and a flatter, outer coarse filter. Separate them as directed by your specific model (some just pull apart).[](https://www.youtube.com/shorts/HtPgaw2PuM4) [[1]](https://www.youtube.com/shorts/HtPgaw2PuM4)[[2]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TBRn1mqCLkc&t=50)[[3]](https://producthelp.whirlpool.com/Dishwashers/Product_Info/Dishwasher_Cleaning_and_Care/How_to_Clean_the_Dishwasher_Filters)[[4]](https://www.beaconsaves.com/blog/how-to-clean-a-dishwasher-filter-step-by-step)[[5]](https://www.instagram.com/reel/C23VwpeOAut/?hl=en)

2. Wash the Filter

- **Rinse:** Rinse the filter under the warmest running water possible to clear out large food particles.[[1]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6NKUjmnRiSw&t=23)[[2]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Qf8SHP701xM&t=13)
- **Soak:** For stubborn, greasy residue or calcium deposits, soak the filter parts in a bowl or sink filled with warm water, a squirt of dish soap, and about a cup of distilled white vinegar. Let it sit for 15 to 20 minutes.[](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Qf8SHP701xM&t=13) [[1]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Qf8SHP701xM&t=13)[[2]](https://www.youtube.com/shorts/M8m1PiZpfpM?vl=en)
- **Scrub:** Gently brush away remaining debris or slime using a soft-bristled tool, such as an old toothbrush. Avoid stiff scouring pads or wire brushes, as these can easily damage the delicate mesh screens.[](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Qf8SHP701xM&t=13) [[1]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Qf8SHP701xM&t=13)[[2]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TBRn1mqCLkc&t=50)

3. Clean the Drain

- While the filter is out, take a moment to look into the drain opening at the bottom of the dishwasher. Scoop out any loose food bits, glass, or debris sitting in the sump area to prevent future clogs.[](https://www.facebook.com/RenDuHOfficial/videos/pov-how-to-clean-a-dishwasher-drain-pump-filter-this-will-vary-from-model-to-mod/26133218482931539/) [[1]](https://www.facebook.com/RenDuHOfficial/videos/pov-how-to-clean-a-dishwasher-drain-pump-filter-this-will-vary-from-model-to-mod/26133218482931539/)

4. Reinstall the Filter

- Put the filter assembly back together, place it back into the bottom of the dishwasher tub, and twist it clockwise until you feel or hear it lock into place. It should feel secure and not turn freely.[](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TBRn1mqCLkc&t=50) [[1]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TBRn1mqCLkc&t=50)

For tips on how to properly maintain your machine and prevent bad odors from building up again:![Related video thumbnail](https://encrypted-tbn1.gstatic.com/images?q=tbn:ANd9GcT_jUNQHfNHzabXD5A0lyC76qpEWxAYZszXBQIHJV7f7fUV8NUx)
59s[How to Clean Your Dishwasher Filter (Why Your Dishwasher Smells)16K views  · 4 months ago![](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/07210057-2120-0139-0000-f4d1148b6075:7)
YouTube · Clean With Confidence](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Qf8SHP701xM&t=7) *Tip: Experts on platforms like Home Depot generally recommend checking and cleaning your dishwasher filter at least once a month to ensure your dishes stay spotless and your machine operates efficiently. You can also refer to your exact dishwasher manual (such as those from [Whirlpool Product Help](https://producthelp.whirlpool.com/Dishwashers/Product_Info/Dishwasher_Cleaning_and_Care/How_to_Clean_the_Dishwasher_Filters) or [GE Appliances](https://products.geappliances.com/appliance/gea-support-search-content?contentId=35611) ) for model-specific removal and locking instructions.* [[1]](https://www.facebook.com/RenDuHOfficial/videos/pov-how-to-clean-a-dishwasher-drain-pump-filter-this-will-vary-from-model-to-mod/26133218482931539/)

items.text: To clean your dishwasher filter, pull out the bottom rack, unlock and remove the filter assembly from the bottom of the tub, and rinse it under warm water. Soak stubborn grime or hard water buildup in hot, soapy water with a splash of white vinegar. Gently scrub with a soft brush, then reassemble. YouTube · Clean With Confidence

items.text: Tip: Experts on platforms like Home Depot generally recommend checking and cleaning your dishwasher filter at least once a month to ensure your dishes stay spotless and your machine operates efficiently. You can also refer to your exact dishwasher manual (such as those from Whirlpool Product Help or GE Appliances) for model-specific removal and locking instructions.
